title: Moosend vs Zoho Campaigns (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Moosend vs Zoho Campaigns: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Moosend vs Zoho Campaigns: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Moosend and Zoho Campaigns comes down to your specific use case. Moosend is built for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Zoho Campaigns targets Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses

faq.q: Is Moosend better than Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Moosend wins for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Zoho Campaigns is stronger for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: Zoho Campaigns starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Zoho Campaigns to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
